allow: Bash(git config user.email "warlet.invest@gmail.com" && git config user.name "Mike Warlet")

Bash(git add app/AuthContext.js && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Create AuthContext with login/register/logout and token persistence

Adds global auth state management via React Context with:
- login/register/logout functions
- Auto-restore session from AsyncStorage on mount
- refreshUser to sync with backend
- useAuth hook for easy consumption

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add app/config.js && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Add apiCall and apiUpload with auto JWT token injection

- apiCall: reads token from AsyncStorage and injects Authorization header
- apiUpload: multipart/form-data upload with auth
- Original api\(\) unchanged for unauthenticated calls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add app/App.js && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Integrate AuthContext and dark theme into App.js

- Wrap app in AuthProvider for global auth state
- Apply dark navigation theme using theme.js colors
- Fix missing Text import for tab icons
- Add StatusBar with light-content style
- Loading spinner while restoring session

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add app/screens/Login.js && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Update Login screen with AuthContext and dark theme

- Use useAuth\(\) hook for login/register instead of direct API calls
- Apply dark theme from theme.js design system
- Add KeyboardAvoidingView for better UX
- Remove direct AsyncStorage/navigation handling \(AuthContext manages it\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add app/screens/Profile.js && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: Profile screen - fix apiCall import, add dark theme, use AuthContext

- Fix broken apiCall import \(was undefined, now from config.js\)
- Use AuthContext logout instead of manual AsyncStorage handling
- Apply dark theme from theme.js design system
- Add error state with retry button

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Sprint 7 - Discovery Engine, Gamification, Push Notifications, WebSocket, 500+ Perfumes

- Discovery Engine: scent quiz \(12 questions\), recommendation algorithm, explore sections
- Gamification: 34 badges across 8 categories, XP levels, leaderboard, achievement tracking
- Push Notifications: Expo Push API integration, preferences, token management
- WebSocket: Durable Objects ChatRoom for real-time messaging, typing, online status
- 500+ perfumes seeded \(450 new across 50+ brands, designer + niche\)
- Deploy script for migrations + worker deployment
- Updated CLAUDE.md with Sprint 7 status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(apt list --installed 2>/dev/null | grep -i chrom; which playwright 2>/dev/null; dpkg -l | grep -i "headless\\|chrome\\|chromium" 2>/dev/null | head -5)
